textByHash.0eb45ff010d8a4cdeb1be469d3bd81e6d09c6de0: Come here my friend, so I may embrace you. You have done us a great turn by disposing of those Menaphites.
textByHash.e719ad26db62149cb529bd2ed1656fa9ab3d4c4a: Regardless, I am still very grateful. Now I have the town at my mercy.
textByHash.f1e15ee261f41971581eebfbec1d8285a7c569fe: Do you want a reward? A fee? I will not begrudge you that.
textByHash.27cdaeaee6a2b8ce530e3cb6cc85d494049dba67: How the worm has turned. This no-name adventurer who was robbing, looting and poisoning not too long ago is now taking the moral high ground! Or are you trying to keep the whole town for yourself?
textByHash.52f3e382b3a8ae56e92e7a1e90ba9dbcbce456f0: Pollnivneach is mine. You won't run me out without a fight. If you want us gone, you must defeat our strongest warrior in battle.
textByHash.0e14f1bbd8050244dc93dfff2bf00155c80ccdec: Adventurer... I have underestimated you. Perhaps we can come to an agreement. How about I work for you? Think of the riches you would make.
textByHash.d9b7edc0ddefcad4c7027044672c83faee7f6358: Ali Morrisane?! You fool. You've been had!
textByHash.90de3acd7423f8c886578d9507ed32227b82ea9a: Go have a chat with these precious townspeople of yours. You'll soon learn the truth.
textByHash.6074e093c25ff3106b6f0b907f355a18e464f187: Ha! You fancy yourself the people's champion, do you? You are so naive. You don't even realise you've been tricked!
textByHash.40fc04c495e30a7b4654e93fb10686aa0a64af9d: Go have a chat with these precious townspeople of yours. You'll soon see.
